patch.value: Calendar agent ergonomics: equal start/end rejected; schedule-less Event items invisible

Dogfood 2026-05-22 (related to pm-fu5d CAL1): (1) start=+Nd,end=+Nd (identical offsets) is rejected as equal start/end - agents naively pass identical offsets; auto-treat equal start/end as an instant event (or interpret bare end as end-of-window). (2) pm create event 'Title' with no --event schedule creates a Type=Event item that never appears on the calendar (no events array) - warn at create time or surface schedule-less events with a 'no time set' note.
